title: hieracium alatum subsp. blitoides
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. blitoides, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion-like plant family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium alatum subsp. blitoides include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues due to its high concentration of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used as a tincture or tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it can also be applied topically as a salve or cream to aid in wound healing.
